testcase.name: testTripArrangement_TwelvePerTrip

testcase.name: testSequenceAssignment_GlobalIncrement

failure.message: 顺位应递增，当前: 5, 前一个: 7 ==> expected: <true> but was: <false>

testcase.name: testBoundary_NoStockInfo

failure.message: 明细数量应一致 ==> expected: <5> but was: <10>
